query: SELECT poNumber, vendorName, COUNT(*) AS productCount FROM products WHERE poNumber IN ('PO-BACKUP-EDGE-1778040033439','PO-TRACE-1778040038041','PO-STOCK-BLOCK-1778040033229','PO-20260506-04','PO-20260506-05','PO-20260506-06','PO-20260506-08','PO-20260506-09') GROUP BY poNumber, vendorName ORDER BY poNumber;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT poNumber, vendorName, COUNT(*) AS productCount FROM products WHERE poNumber IN ('PO-BACKUP-EDGE-1778040033439','PO-TRACE-1778040038041','PO-STOCK-BLOCK-1778040033229','PO-20260506-04','PO-20260506-05','PO-20260506-06','PO-20260506-08','PO-20260506-09') GROUP BY poNumber, vendorName ORDER BY poNumber;
